title: tengine.race.event v1
description: A sparse, discrete event within a run (overtake, collision, drift, checkpoint, ...) — labeled signals that enrich the dense trajectory for imitation learning and oracle design. Source: /tengine/race. Sparse by construction: emit on meaningful transitions, NOT every tick (per-tick data belongs in the episode's trajectory_artifact).

t_ms.description: Milliseconds since episode start at which the event occurred.

kind.description: Event type. overtake/overtaken carry actor/target; collision carries magnitude; drift_start/end bracket a drift; off_track/recover bracket a track exit.

track_u.description: Normalized track progress in [0,1] at the event.

magnitude.description: Kind-specific scalar (collision impulse, drift angle, boost duration, ...).

actor.description: Pod/pilot id that initiated the event (e.g. the overtaker).

target.description: Pod/pilot id the event was against (e.g. the overtaken).
